nodes.description: Identity and access — users, clients, coaches, employees, departments, onboarding, password resets, coach-client mappings
Learning content — journeys, chapters, lessons, lesson details, slides, video libraries
User engagement — backpacks (user responses), tasks, journal entries, ratings (current and legacy)
Coaching sessions — meetings, attendees, coach availability, coach profiles
Communications — SMS details/schedules, dynamic SMS, email/mail, notifications, chatbot documents/histories/sessions
Platform infrastructure — activity log, documents, background jobs
Knowledge graph infrastructure — MCP servers, CLI, seeds, cache
Tory learning path engine — profile interpretation, content tagging, roadmap generation, adaptive reassessment, coach compatibility, HR dashboards
Core user entity - employees/learners who take journeys and complete lessons. Hub table with 20 references. Links to clients, coaches, onboarding, ratings, and all learning activity.
Client organization (employer/company) that purchases coaching programs. Clients own users, map to coaches, and manage departments. Hub with 5 incoming references.
Coach entity with profile and availability. Coaches are mapped to clients and attend meetings. Hub with 4 incoming references.
Employee within a client organization. Linked to nx_users and departments. Represents the learner role within a company.
Platform administrator with elevated privileges for managing the coaching platform.
Password reset tokens for platform users. Separate tables for different user types (general, client, coach).

Learning journey - the top-level learning path. nx_journey_details is a hub table (10 refs) linking to chapters, lessons, ratings, backpacks, tasks, and journals. Core of the learning hierarchy: Journey > Chapter > Lesson.

Chapter within a journey - mid-level learning unit. nx_chapter_details is a hub table (13 refs) connecting journeys to lessons, ratings, sms, and tasks. Learning hierarchy: Journey > Chapter > Lesson.

Lesson - the atomic learning unit. nx_lessons is a hub (13 refs). Contains lesson details and slides. Links to journeys, chapters, ratings, tasks, backpacks, and SMS. Learning hierarchy: Journey > Chapter > Lesson.
Content backpack - saved/collected learning materials tied to journeys, chapters, and lessons. 5833 rows - indicates active use. References journey_details, chapter_details, lessons, and slides.
Uploaded documents and chatbot knowledge base documents for the learning platform.
Video content library linked to journeys, chapters, and lessons. Referenced by lesson_slides for video-based learning content.

User ratings for learning content at every level (journey, chapter, lesson, slide). nx_user_ratings has 6 references spanning the full learning hierarchy. old_ratings preserves historical rating data. 3657 total rows.
Tasks assigned within learning journeys. 2829 rows. Links to journey_details, chapter_details, lessons, and slides. Created by users.
Coaching meetings/sessions between coaches and learners. Includes attendee tracking with participant roles.
User journal entries tied to learning progress. Links to users, journey details, chapter details, and lessons. Reflective learning tool.
SMS communication system for learning nudges and reminders. Includes scheduling and dynamic content tied to chapters and lessons. 1323 detail rows.
Notification history tracking for users, coaches, and clients. Multi-stakeholder notification delivery.
Email communication system with transfer tracking. mail_communication_details is a hub with self-referencing for threaded conversations.
AI chatbot for learning support. Tracks sessions and conversation history with question/answer pairs and timing.
Polymorphic activity log (Laravel Spatie). 57210 rows (77% of all data). Tracks all user actions with subject/causer polymorphism. 30 distinct log types.
Many-to-many mapping between clients and coaches. Core relationship table for the coaching business model.
Organizational departments within client companies. Employees belong to departments, departments belong to clients.
Laravel queue/job infrastructure for async processing (email sending, SMS dispatch, etc.).
Claude Opus-generated personality trait tags per lesson. Multi-pass confidence-gated tagging with coach review. Foundation for similarity scoring and roadmap matching.
Claude-interpreted personality profile from EPP (29 dimensions) + onboarding Q&A. Includes trait vector, motivation cluster, strengths, gaps, and user-facing narrative.
Personalized adaptive learning path per learner. Versioned, with pedagogy mode snapshot. Tracks completion and generation rationale.
Individual lesson assignment within a roadmap. Includes match score, rationale, critical flag (guardrail), and discovery phase marker.
Periodic re-evaluation records (mini every 4-6 weeks, full EPP quarterly). Tracks profile drift and triggers path adaptation.
Coach curation actions on roadmaps (reorder/swap/lock/unlock). Guardrails prevent removal of critical lessons. Tracks divergence.
Aggregated HR dashboard data per user per snapshot date. Includes completion, engagement, coach effectiveness, Tory accuracy, and team aggregate support.
Client-company pedagogy preference: gap-fill (A), strength-lead (B), or configurable blend (C) with ratio. Set at company onboarding.

edges.inferred_from: meetings reference nx_users via hosting_by; meeting_attendees via participant_id; coaches via coach_id
tory_content_tags references nx_lessons/lesson_details; tory_roadmap_items references nx_lessons
tory adaptive layer reads backpacks/tasks/ratings for progress monitoring and path adaptation
tory dispatches SMS/email nudges via existing comms layer for path changes, stalls, reassessments

Content tagging pipeline is core Tory bootstrap layer functionality. tory_content_tags table is owned by tory-agent, and the tagging pipeline generates data for it. This is the L1-L3 defense pipeline described in the agent spec.
Schema migration for coach curation API (tory_path_events table, tory_recommendations columns) - bead baap-qkk.5
E2E test for coach curation API - bead baap-qkk.5
Content-agent has built and maintained tory_engine.py across beads baap-qkk.4, baap-qkk.5, and baap-qkk.6. Memory file confirms ownership.
E2E test for coach review queue (baap-qkk.10), created by content-agent
New 3-pane workspace view for the Tory module - replaces the old single-pane tory.js view. Created for bead baap-8rg.
CSS for the new Tory Workspace 3-pane layout. Created for bead baap-8rg.
